definitionorgloss.value: menghalang; menahan supaya tidak dapat bergerak

example.value: Bah Peran kibesat nu eng, "Nong nu Cameron Highland ya bihadang, biget joi ku arik adeh medei mong garaj. Kelemnek manik lebat lei mong jeoi garaj ku nong ajeh."

translation.value: Bah Peran berpesan kepada saya, "Jalan itu ke Cameron Highland dihalang, tidak dibenarkan mengikuti jalan tersebut kerana terdapat tanah runtuh. Malan tadi hujan lebat sehingga ada banyak (kejadian) tanah runtuh di (sepanjang) jalan tersebut."

Bah Peran gave advice to me, "the road to Cameron Highlands has been blocked, that road cannot be used because there has been a landslide. Last night it rained heavily and lots of earth slid onto that road."
